requirement_topic.en: Chad Grid Connection — 220/380 V 50 Hz, IEC 62116 / IEC 61727, and Project-Specific Settings
requirement_topic.zh: 乍得并网——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及项目专属设置
requirement_topic.zht: 乍得併網——220/380 V 50 Hz、IEC 62116 / IEC 61727及項目專屬設置

summary.en: Solar PV inverter projects in Chad should be handled as project review items under SNE-led acceptance, including interconnection conditions, inspection, and commissioning sign-off. Chad’s low-voltage context is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, matching China nominally. Local project parameters still drive final approval: relay settings, harmonic limits, metering points, communication assumptions, and commissioning schedule.
summary.zh: 乍得光伏逆变器项目应按SNE主导项目审查处理，包括并网条件、检验和调试签字。乍得低压系统为220/380 V、50 Hz，与中国名义值一致。但最终批准仍由本地项目参数驱动，包括保护设置、谐波限值、计量点、通信和调试节奏。
summary.zht: 乍得太陽能逆變器專案應按SNE主導項目審查處理，包括並網條件、檢驗和調試簽字。乍得低壓系統為220/380 V、50 Hz，與中國名義值一致。但最終批准仍由本地項目參數驅動，包括保護設置、諧波上限、計量點、通訊及調試節奏。

standards_or_laws: SNE project-specific grid-connection and commissioning requirements in Chad
IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021, and assumes 220/380 V 50 Hz systems. For Chad, this is a useful baseline but must be complemented with SNE project acceptance terms and local commissioning requirements.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器常见证据包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021，默认基于220/380 V 50 Hz系统。用于乍得时仅作工程基线，仍需补充SNE项目验收条款和当地调试要求。
summary.zht: 中國太陽能逆變器常見證據包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021，預設基於220/380 V 50 Hz系統。用於乍得時僅作工程基線，仍需補充SNE項目驗收條款和當地調試要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求

gap.en: Gap: project files should add SNE acceptance scope, commissioning tests, and local protection coordination. Nominal voltage alignment is helpful but not sufficient. Include heat/UV and dust assumptions for deployment sites, and confirm whether grid commissioning is for public utility interconnection or closed-site captive demand.
gap.zh: 差距：项目文件应补充SNE验收范围、调试测试和本地保护配合。名义电压对齐有利，但不充分。应补充部署点的高温/紫外/粉尘承受假设，并确认并网对象是公共电网还是封闭站点自用。
gap.zht: 差距：專案文件應補充SNE驗收範圍、調試測試和本地保護配合。名義電壓對齊有利，但不充分。應補充佈署點的高溫/紫外/粉塵承受假設，並確認併網對象是公共電網還是封閉場站自用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected PV projects where SNE acceptance applies; voltage match is supportive but not sufficient
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese documents are domestic support only

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Chad, 220/380 V 50 Hz grid alignment with China is a good starting point. Project compliance is still determined by SNE acceptance requirements, especially protection settings, harmonics, metering, communication, and commissioning readiness per site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对乍得而言，与中国220/380 V 50 Hz的对齐是良好起点。合规仍由SNE项目验收决定，尤其是保护设置、谐波、计量、通信和每站点调试准备情况。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對乍得而言，與中國220/380 V 50 Hz的對齊是良好起點。合規仍由SNE項目驗收決定，尤其是保護設置、諧波、計量、通訊和每站點調試準備情況。
